page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c8ae.4xlarge is a compute-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 16 dedicated physical cores of the x86_64 AMD EPYC 9T34 processor running at a clock speed of 3.4 GHz. The instance is configured with 32.0 GB of RAM, providing a 1:2 vCPU-to-memory ratio of 2.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware, relying instead on network-attached storage and offering a baseline network bandwidth of 12 Gbps.

In benchmark evaluations, the AMD EPYC processor delivers top-tier single-core CPU performance, placing in the top 10% of tested servers with a stress-ng single-core score of 3115.19. Multi-core performance and memory bandwidth fall within the average range, with a stress-ng multi-core score of 24940.13 and a large-block memory read bandwidth of 49.71 GB/sec. The processor supports advanced instruction sets, including AVX-512 vector and neural network instructions (AVX512_VNNI, AVX512_BF16), which accelerate cryptographic and vector-based operations.

This instance offers a balanced cost-to-performance profile for compute-heavy workloads that do not require massive memory footprints or local NVMe storage. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent performance without resource contention. The ecs.c8ae.4xlarge is well-suited for compute-intensive tasks such as web serving, high-performance batch processing, data compression, and application servers.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c8ae.4xlarge is a compute-optimized instance featuring 16 dedicated physical cores of an AMD EPYC 9T34 processor running at 3.4 GHz, paired with 32.0 GB of RAM. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, this x86_64 instance delivers top-tier single-core performance, ranking in the top 10% of benchmarks, while maintaining average multi-core and memory bandwidth metrics. The hardware lacks local storage and GPUs, but provides a baseline network bandwidth of 12 Gbps and supports advanced instruction sets like AVX-512. This resource profile offers high qualitative cost efficiency for compute-bound workloads that require dedicated CPU resources without massive memory overhead. It is highly suitable for web serving, batch processing, and compression tasks.

32.0 GB of system memory with a 2.0 GB per core ratio
